name: openclaw-terminal
description: OpenClaw Terminal - Windows 超级系统助手

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run build:electron
scripts.start: npm run build:electron && concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5174 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5174 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
